description_long: This is a two-story police station building with a flat black roof, featuring a prominent cylindrical water tower on one corner and a large rooftop billboard. The facade is constructed from dark brick, with multiple rectangular windows on the upper floor and a main glass entrance door at street level. The sidewalk in front is lined with street lamps, a fire hydrant, and small planters, giving the building an urban streetscape context. The billboard on the roof displays a Coca-Cola advertisement, adding a commercial touch to the otherwise official structure. The building's exterior is simple and functional, with minimal decorative elements, focusing on utility and accessibility. No police-specific signage or vehicles are visible, and the overall design is utilitarian with a slightly industrial feel.
description: A dark brick, two-story police station with a flat roof, rooftop water tower, and a large Coca-Cola billboard, set on a city sidewalk with street lamps and planters.
description_view_0: The left side of the building is mostly featureless, showing the water tower and billboard on the roof, with street lamps and sidewalk details visible.
description_view_1: The front facade displays the main entrance, several windows, and urban elements like street lamps and planters, with the water tower and billboard visible above.
description_view_2: This angle highlights the front and right side, showing the main glass entrance, windows, fire hydrant, and the full Coca-Cola billboard on the roof.
description_view_3: The right side of the building is mostly blank, with the water tower and billboard structure visible on the roof, and a street lamp on the sidewalk.
attribute_building_facade_features: Rectangular windows on the upper floor, main glass entrance door, flat roof, rooftop water tower, large rooftop billboard, street lamps, sidewalk planters, fire hydrant.
